name: How can I tell whether the problem is my voice, my mic, or Siri itself?
description: Test in a quiet place, clean the mic, and retrain voice recognition. If Siri improves, the issue was likely environmental or hardware-related.

mainEntity.name: How can I tell whether the problem is my voice, my mic, or Siri itself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, especially if Siri is constantly mishearing you. Try retraining voice recognition, checking microphone cleanliness, and speaking at a steady pace in a quieter environment. If the problem only happens in one room or while driving, the environment may be the bigger issue.
acceptedAnswer.description: Test in a quiet place, clean the mic, and retrain voice recognition. If Siri improves, the issue was likely environmental or hardware-related.
